title: Endocrine Society Testosterone Therapy in Men With Hypogonadism
supports_claim: Symptoms/signs plus consistently low testosterone; repeat morning T; LH/FSH cause workup; avoid TRT in fertility planning, prostate/breast cancer, high PSA without evaluation, elevated hematocrit, severe untreated OSA, severe LUTS, uncontrolled HF, recent MI/stroke, thrombophilia.
does_not_support: Does not support TRT for wellness goals alone.

title: AUA Testosterone Deficiency Guideline
supports_claim: Total testosterone below 300 ng/dL is a reasonable cutoff supporting diagnosis when combined with symptoms/signs and repeat testing.
does_not_support: Does not support diagnosis from a wellness goal or one random lab.

title: ACP Testosterone Treatment in Men With Age-Related Low Testosterone
supports_claim: ACP suggests testosterone for age-related low T only for sexual dysfunction and recommends against starting for energy, vitality, physical function, or cognition.
does_not_support: Does not cover every organic hypogonadism case.

title: FDA 2025 class-wide testosterone labeling changes
supports_claim: FDA added/updated blood-pressure warning; TRAVERSE trial found no increased MACE in men using testosterone for hypogonadism; ABPM studies confirmed class-wide BP increases.
does_not_support: Not used as regulatory gate or proof of risk-free use.

title: HHS 2026 requested testosterone label updates
supports_claim: HHS/FDA requested updates on age-related limitation, prostate cancer risk, and BPH warnings; still recommends screening/monitoring; severe BPH needs monitoring.
does_not_support: Requested label information, not a clinical guideline or regulatory gate.

title: AUA/ASRM Male Infertility Guideline
supports_claim: Exogenous testosterone can suppress spermatogenesis; fertility intentions require fertility-preserving review.
does_not_support: Does not provide wellness TRT pathway.
